channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Color Scheme per Language - Sun Jun 14 18:18:30 UTC 2026
item.description:
Color Scheme per Language switches the editor color scheme based on the language of the file you are working in. Map each language to one of your installed color...
vendor: Dot Red downloads: 4 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.appelflap.color-scheme-per-language

item.title: TreeSitterViewer - Mon Jun 15 06:18:17 UTC 2026
item.description:
TreeSitterViewer A powerful and intuitive IntelliJ IDEA plugin that visualizes the abstract syntax tree (AST) of your source code in real-time using Tree-sitter...
vendor: Enaium downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: cn.enaium.treesitter.viewer

item.title: Java File Download Router - Sun Jun 14 06:05:14 UTC 2026
item.description:
Routes downloaded Java files into the correct source package directory. Select a module, then pick a .java or .zip file from your Downloads folder. The plugin reads...
vendor: Nick Kemp downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.github.nickkemp.javafilerouter

item.title: Flexible For Mantine - Thu Jun 11 15:33:33 UTC 2026
item.description:
Smart completion, hover docs, drag-and-drop, auto-imports, and inspections for Mantine. Drag-and-drop from the component browser to your editor. We are an unofficial...
vendor: Ilscipio GmbH downloads: 2 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: com.ilscipio.mantine

item.title: Godot Sidecar File Nesting - Fri Jun 12 17:17:03 UTC 2026
item.description:
Nests Godot sidecar files like .uid and ..translation under their matching files in tree views.
vendor: LeeGod downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dev.imanity.godot.uidnesting

item.title: Markdown Image Paster - Sat Jun 13 07:42:57 UTC 2026
item.description:
Paste images into Markdown files — auto-saved to the correct directory based on front matter rules. Why this plugin? Jekyll / Hexo and other static blog frameworks...
vendor: Yungyu downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.github.yungyu16.markdown-image-paster

item.title: Rip and Tear - Fri Jun 12 12:55:47 UTC 2026
item.description:
Run the original DOOM inside IntelliJ — for real. Open the Tools menu, hit Rip and Tear, and DOOM opens as an editor tab like any other file. Powered by the brilliant...
vendor: NerfLabs downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.nerflabs.intellijdoom

item.title: Wiremark - Thu Jun 11 21:20:56 UTC 2026
item.description:
Sketch user interfaces as plain text and see them rendered as hand-drawn, Balsamiq-style wireframes right inside your IDE. Wiremark brings wiremark — a concise...

item.title: Bitbucket PR Reviewer - Sat Jun 13 07:22:34 UTC 2026
item.description:
Review Bitbucket Cloud pull requests without leaving IntelliJ IDEA. PR list — browse open pull requests with filters: All, Needs My Review, My PRs Side-by-side diff...
vendor: Ngaio downloads: 18 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.bitbucketplugin

item.title: TabMaster - Fri Jun 12 11:07:26 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Christoph Wagner downloads: 23 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: de.christophwagner.idea.tabmaster
